items.example: We took a ferry from the mainland to the island.
We travelled from London to Edinburgh by coach.
Trams are a cheap way to get around the city centre.
A shuttle bus runs between the hotel and the airport every hour.
Our flight to Paris was delayed by two hours.
The train to Manchester departs from platform 3.
We waited in the departure lounge until our flight was called.
Please show your boarding pass at the gate.
A single ticket to Brighton costs £25.
It's cheaper to buy a return ticket than two singles.
There was a three-hour delay due to bad weather.
The journey from York to London takes about two hours by train.
